circuit_breaker.note: 90% failure threshold means CB almost never trips - FLAWED

outgoing_edges_ft.analysis: CB present but 90% threshold means it almost never trips. Retry=2 with 300ms wait (has backoff). beta = 2 * 0.6 = 1.2. Treating as flawed_cb because CB exists but is ineffective.
